section_name: Agreements for Services on Regional Tollway Authority Projects
text: Notwithstanding Section 201.703 (Expenditures for Roads Not on the Highway System) (c), the department and a regional tollway authority governed by Chapter 366 (Regional Tollway Authorities) may enter into an agreement for the provision by the department, for fair and reasonable compensation, of services on the regional tollway authority’s turnpike projects, including but not limited to courtesy patrols.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 201. Gen. Provisions & Admin.
##### § 201.707 — Agreements for Services on Regional Tollway Authority Projects

Notwithstanding Section 201.703 (Expenditures for Roads Not on the Highway System) (c), the department and a regional tollway authority governed by Chapter 366 (Regional Tollway Authorities) may enter into an agreement for the provision by the department, for fair and reasonable compensation, of services on the regional tollway authority’s turnpike projects, including but not limited to courtesy patrols.

*Added by Acts 1999, 76th Leg., ch. 576, Sec. 2, eff. Sept. 1, 1999.*

subsections.text: Notwithstanding Section 201.703 (Expenditures for Roads Not on the Highway System) (c), the department and a regional tollway authority governed by Chapter 366 (Regional Tollway Authorities) may enter into an agreement for the provision by the department, for fair and reasonable compensation, of services on the regional tollway authority’s turnpike projects, including but not limited to courtesy patrols.
